use_cases: Selecting dates for appointment scheduling in a modal overlay
Choosing delivery or booking dates in e-commerce checkout flows
Picking date ranges for analytics filters in dashboards
Setting event dates in calendar-based productivity tools
Scheduling resource bookings in project management apps
ai_summary: A shadcn/ui calendar picker component that opens within a drawer overlay for date selection. Features minimalist flat styling with click-to-reveal drawer interaction and hover states on calendar cells. Suitable for SaaS, e-commerce, and healthcare applications requiring inline date picking without navigating to a separate page.
